Interface ProjectDao

public interface ProjectDao
Data Access Object (DAO) interface for Project entity. Declares CRUD operations for managing pixel art projects.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    delete(Project project)
    Deletes a project from the database.
    int
    delete(Project... projects)
    Deletes multiple projects from the database.
    long
    insert(Project project)
    Inserts a single project into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(Project... projects)
    Inserts multiple projects into the database.
    List<Long>
    insert(Collection<Project> projects)
    Inserts multiple projects into the database.
    int
    markAsDeleted(long projectId)
    Marks a project as deleted (soft delete).
    int
    purgeDeleted(long userId)
    Permanently deletes all projects marked as deleted for a specific user.
    int
    restore(long projectId)
    Restores a previously deleted project.
    LiveData<List<Project>>
    searchByName(long userId, String searchTerm)
    Retrieves projects by name search (case-insensitive partial match).
    LiveData<Project>
    select(long projectId)
    Retrieves a project by its ID.
    LiveData<List<Project>>
    selectAllByUser(long userId)
    Retrieves all projects (including deleted) for a specific user.
    LiveData<List<Project>>
    selectByUser(long userId)
    Retrieves all projects for a specific user, ordered by last edited timestamp (most recent first).
    LiveData<List<Project>>
    selectByUserOrderedByName(long userId)
    Retrieves all non-deleted projects for a specific user, ordered by project name.
    LiveData<List<Project>>
    selectDeletedByUser(long userId)
    Retrieves all deleted projects for a specific user (for recovery functionality).
    int
    update(Project project)
    Updates an existing project in the database.
    int
    update(Project... projects)
    Updates multiple existing projects in the database.

  • Method Details

    • insert

      long insert(Project project)
      Inserts a single project into the database.
      Parameters:
      project - Project instance to insert.
      Returns:
      ID of the newly inserted project.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Collection<Project> projects)
      Inserts multiple projects into the database.
      Parameters:
      projects - Collection of projects to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted projects.

    • insert

      List<Long> insert(Project... projects)
      Inserts multiple projects into the database.
      Parameters:
      projects - Variable number of projects to insert.
      Returns:
      List of IDs of the newly inserted projects.

    • update

      int update(Project project)
      Updates an existing project in the database.
      Parameters:
      project - Project instance with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • update

      int update(Project... projects)
      Updates multiple existing projects in the database.
      Parameters:
      projects - Variable number of projects with updated values.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • delete

      int delete(Project project)
      Deletes a project from the database. Note: Cascades to related layers, pixels, autosave snapshots, and export history.
      Parameters:
      project - Project instance to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • delete

      int delete(Project... projects)
      Deletes multiple projects from the database.
      Parameters:
      projects - Variable number of projects to delete.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.

    • select

      LiveData<Project> select(long projectId)
      Retrieves a project by its ID.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing the project, or null if not found.

    • selectByUser

      LiveData<List<Project>> selectByUser(long userId)
      Retrieves all projects for a specific user, ordered by last edited timestamp (most recent first).
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of projects for the specified user.

    • selectByUserOrderedByName

      LiveData<List<Project>> selectByUserOrderedByName(long userId)
      Retrieves all non-deleted projects for a specific user, ordered by project name.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of non-deleted projects for the specified user.

    • selectDeletedByUser

      LiveData<List<Project>> selectDeletedByUser(long userId)
      Retrieves all deleted projects for a specific user (for recovery functionality).
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of deleted projects for the specified user.

    • selectAllByUser

      LiveData<List<Project>> selectAllByUser(long userId)
      Retrieves all projects (including deleted) for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of all projects for the specified user.

    • searchByName

      LiveData<List<Project>> searchByName(long userId, String searchTerm)
      Retrieves projects by name search (case-insensitive partial match).
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      searchTerm - Search term to match against project names.
      Returns:
      LiveData containing a list of matching projects.

    • markAsDeleted

      int markAsDeleted(long projectId)
      Marks a project as deleted (soft delete).
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID to mark as deleted.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • restore

      int restore(long projectId)
      Restores a previously deleted project.
      Parameters:
      projectId - Project ID to restore.
      Returns:
      Number of rows updated.

    • purgeDeleted

      int purgeDeleted(long userId)
      Permanently deletes all projects marked as deleted for a specific user.
      Parameters:
      userId - User ID.
      Returns:
      Number of rows deleted.
